title: As Suwayq Heat Wave
lead: As Suwayq is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.71. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in As Suwayq has resulted in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.5 GG, significantly higher than normal.
 The relative humidity is at 12%, and wind speed is at 20.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat.
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense stress due to this extreme weather event.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in As Suwayq immediately.
